Epoxy.description: A basic but strong and hard-setting organic polymer.
Epoxy.flavorText: UDA safety guidelines recommend not breathing in the fumes.

Electronics.description: A modular control unit, adaptable to most I/Os.

Electric_Furnace_Large.description: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.

Envirosuit.description: An entry-level S5 life support system from Xigo, Earth\'s largest employer.
Envirosuit.flavorText: In theory, a Xigo general issue \'Self-contained Surface Survival Suit System\' (S5) offers full body environmental containment and air processing. How many wore this before you is unclear. While no longer entirely air-tight, the suit should still provide sufficient protection to the average user.

Envirosuit_Sand.description: An entry-level S5 life support system from Xigo, Earth\'s largest employer.
Envirosuit_Sand.flavorText: In theory, a Xigo general issue \'Self-contained Surface Survival Suit System\' (S5) offers full body environmental containment and air processing. How many wore this before you is unclear. While no longer entirely air-tight, the suit should still provide sufficient protection to the average user.

Envirosuit_Deluxe.description: A rare, early-model First Cohort envirosuit, issued exclusively to pioneer prospectors on the planet.
Envirosuit_Deluxe.flavorText: Originally issued by the UDA, these suits have subsequently become valuable collectors\' items. No longer available for purchase.

Envirosuit_Shengong.description: Enhanced heat resistance with extended resource and module capacity.
Envirosuit_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong\'s \'protextile\' system relies on ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastic \'cloth\', offering lightweight heat protection and rapid 3D printability.

Envirosuit_Shengong_2.description: Offers reinforced insulation for cold-weather environments with extended resource and module capacity.
Envirosuit_Shengong_2.flavorText: Shengong\'s \'protextile\' system relies on ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastic \'cloth\', offering lightweight protection and rapid 3D printability.

Envirosuit_Tier2.description: A general issue S5 envirosuit with extended life support systems.
Envirosuit_Tier2.flavorText: The Xigo S5-II is a full-spectrum environmental protection jumpsuit, helmet and life-support system, offering an augment slot and extended oxygen capacity.

Envirosuit_Tier3.description: An enhanced and lightly armored S5 envirosuit offering more functionality and life support systems than the S5-II.
Envirosuit_Tier3.flavorText: The Xigo S5-X is a surprisingly high-spec unit for the price. A complete survival system, it features basic rebreather technology and ultra-high-density polyethylene construction, reducing weight and increasing strength.

Envirosuit_Tier4.description: An upgraded S5-II suit with expanded resource storage.
Envirosuit_Tier4.flavorText: On Earth they judge you by your shoes, on Icarus by your Envirosuit.

Envirosuit_Tier5.description: A lightweight HDPE S5 Envirosuit providing expanded upgrade slots, light armor and respectable storage.
Envirosuit_Tier5.flavorText: Plastic\'s come a long way since Tupperware

Envirosuit_Tier6.description: A lightly armored, double-module S5 suit with micro-texturing to reduce reflectivity.
Envirosuit_Tier6.flavorText: A 2124 survey registered the Xigo \'X\' as one of the most widely-recognized symbols in the world.

Envirosuit_Tier7.description: A broad spectrum, armored S5 envirosuit with dual module slots and decent resource capacity.
Envirosuit_Tier7.flavorText: Originally a website for price comparisons, the Xigo conglomerate grew to embrace distribution and, not long after, production. This was a seemingly indiscriminate expansion, focused not on one industry, but all of them - taking in so many fields that business analysts have largely rejected the idea of Xigo as a single entity.

Electric_Dehumidifier.description: Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
Electric_Dehumidifier.flavorText: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

Electric_Dehumidifier_V2.description: Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
Electric_Dehumidifier_V2.flavorText: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

Envirosuit_Inaris_Alpha.description: An envirosuit with plenty of slots for upgrades to keep on your person.
Envirosuit_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Now there\'s a few less things to carry around with you.

Extractor_Biofuel.description: A portable mining unit powered by Biofuel, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Biofuel.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Extractor_Electric.description: A portable mining unit powered by Electricity, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Electric.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Extractor_Meta.description: A portable mining unit powered by the IC-001 Power Source, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Meta.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Electric_Armor_Bench.description: Powered workbench for advanced textiles production and maintenance.

Exotic_Red.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
Exotic_Red.flavorText: Like the other one, but Red.

Exotic_Red_Raw.description: Requires heavy processing with the Organic Residue Cleanser to be of any use.

Exotic_Processor.description: A machine that can process Volatile Exotics into usable materials.
Exotic_Processor.flavorText: You probably should still keep a good distance from this thing.

Exotic_Delivery_Interface.description: Allows you to order a Delivery Pod for Exotic Retrieval
Exotic_Delivery_Interface.flavorText: Part of the Icarus Orbital Exchange System developed by Sinotai.

Electric_Stove.flavorText: Less explosive than using home made biofuel.

Exotic_Harvester.description: A machine that harvests volatile raw exotics from trees in volcanic regions.
Exotic_Harvester.flavorText: A new machine for new types of Exotics!

Envirosuit_Larkwell_Alpha.description: A highly upgradable Envirosuit with expanded storage. Purpose built for the prospector who wants to carry it all.
Envirosuit_Larkwell_Alpha.flavorText: This suit was designed based on information gathered in a Larkwell Survey. When citing the issues they faced, prospectors ranked "not enough pockets" as their fourth greatest challenge.

Envirosuit_Larkwell_Bravo.description: The Larkwell Bulwark is your defense against the elements. Integrated with adaptive climate control technology.
Envirosuit_Larkwell_Bravo.flavorText: Designed for savage environmental conditions. Many prospectors will not set foot in the fringe zone without their Bulwark equipped... Better to die comfortable.

Explorers_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to help you on your travels.

Equix_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Equix.
Equix_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Elephant_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Elephant.
Elephant_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Equix_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Elephant_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Enzyme_Cannon_Hub.description: When Connected to Power and Given Condensed Enzymes will Charge Up. After Charging can be Triggered to Force Regrow trees in a surrounding area.

Egg.description: A fresh chicken egg, can be cooked in all manner of ways.

Egg_Salad.description: Considered a delicacy back on earth.
Egg_Salad.flavorText: An interesting mix of protein and fruit.

Exposed_Wall_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Exposed_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Electric_Oxite_Dissolver.description: Through a process of Electrolysis, oxygen is extracted from water.
Electric_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: Fresh air not polluted by poisonous Icarus gasses.

Exposed_Wall_Light_Foggy.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Exposed_Ceiling_Light_Foggy.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Energy_Bar.description: A quickly made snack out of natural ingrediants.

ExperimentalGoop.description: The result of a simple experiment.

Enemy_Turret_Pistol.description: A turret that fires on anyone not registered to the system, fires pistol ammo.
Enemy_Turret_Pistol.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Enzyme_Elixir.description: When used Aggressive Enzyme-Enhanced Creatures will be drawn to you.

Electric_Fireplace.description: An electric fireplace, suitable for both basic cooking and heating.
Electric_Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Electric_Fireplace_Ext.description: Wide metal tubing helps the smoke escape the hearth.
Electric_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Electric_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents and extractor fans help clear up any smoke from your shoddily cooked meals.

Exotic_Uranium_Collector.description: A portable mining unit powered by electricity, used to extract resources from Uranium deposits. Creatures will attack this device when active.
Exotic_Uranium_Collector.flavorText: Warning: Uranium extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

EdenStation_OEI.description: Your only option for sending or receiving goods between Icarus and orbit.

Enemy_Turret_Flamethrower.description: A modified turret which fires a steady stream of flame at nearby enemies.
Enemy_Turret_Flamethrower.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Elephant_Tusk.description: While not the biggest tusk one could find on Icarus, it\'s still a valuable source of bone.

Eden_NPC_Hunter.description: UDA assigned Specialist who deals in all manner of Creatures within the area. Will buy Vestiges.

Eden_NPC_Norex.description: A Norex representative who deals in the trading of Biomass. Buys creature parts.
Eden_NPC_Norex.flavorText: Why was it programmed with such an attitude?!

Eden_NPC_Farmer.description: UDA assigned Specialist who deals in all manner of Plants growable on Icarus. Will buy Crops.

Eden_NPC_Fisher.description: UDA assigned Specialist who deals in all manner of Aquatic Life on Icarus. Will buy Fish.

Eden_NPC_Chef.description: The Food shop of the Culinary Specialist.

Envirosuit_Larkwell_White.description: A specialised envirosuit designed for the Eden Scouts.
